title: How does WeakMap allow garbage collection of keys?
description: Explain the difference between Map and WeakMap concerning garbage collection and key references, and show a practical use case.

title: How do you abort a Fetch API request using AbortController?
description: Explain the AbortController and AbortSignal workflow, how it interacts with promises, and how to use it to prevent memory leaks in event loops.

title: What is the difference between Object.is, ==, and ===?
description: Walk through how Object.is handles special values like NaN, +0, and -0, and where standard strict equality !== fails to distinguish them.

title: How do you implement a custom Promise.all polyfill?
description: Write an implementation of Promise.all from scratch, showing how you track counts, handle non-promises, and reject immediately on the first error.

title: How do you implement a custom Promise.any polyfill?
description: Write Promise.any from scratch, ensuring it resolves with the first fulfilled promise, and rejects with an AggregateError if all promises fail.

title: How do you implement a deepFreeze function recursively?
description: Explain how Object.freeze only works shallowly, and write a recursive utility to deeply freeze nested objects and arrays.

title: Implement a robust Event Emitter class.
description: Design a Publisher-Subscriber pattern implementation with subscribe, unsubscribe, and once methods from scratch.

title: How do you implement a simple Promise library from scratch?
description: Outline how you execute callbacks asynchronously, handle chain transitions, and manage resolve/reject states.

title: How do you implement infinite currying in JavaScript?
description: Write an add function that returns a curried function chain supporting variable invocations, e.g. add(1)(2)...(n)().

title: Implement an async task queue with a concurrency limit.
description: Write a runner that processes a large list of async functions, maintaining a hard limit on how many run simultaneously.
